name: TimePicker
description: Captures time value from the user
searchText: timepicker captures time value from the user @mantine/dates /dates/time-picker ampminputlabel ampmlabels ampmref ampmselectprops clearbuttonprops clearsectionmode clearable defaultvalue description descriptionprops disabled error errorprops form format hiddeninputprops hoursinputlabel hoursinputprops hoursplaceholder hoursref hoursstep inputcontainer inputsize inputwrapperorder label labelprops leftsection leftsectionpointerevents leftsectionprops leftsectionwidth loading loadingposition max maxdropdowncontentheight min minutesinputlabel minutesinputprops minutesplaceholder minutesref minutesstep name onblur onchange onfocus pastesplit pointer popoverprops presets radius readonly required reversetimecontrolslist rightsection rightsectionpointerevents rightsectionprops rightsectionwidth scrollareaprops secondsinputlabel secondsinputprops secondsplaceholder secondsref secondsstep size value withasterisk withdropdown witherrorstyles withseconds wrapperprops

props.name: amPmInputLabel
props.description: aria-label of am/pm input

props.name: amPmLabels
props.description: Labels used for am/pm values

props.name: amPmRef
props.description: A ref object to get node reference of the am/pm select

props.name: amPmSelectProps
props.description: Props passed down to am/pm select

props.name: clearButtonProps
props.description: Props passed down to clear button

props.name: clearSectionMode
props.description: Determines how the clear button and rightSection are rendered

props.name: clearable
props.description: Determines whether the clear button should be displayed

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled component default value

props.name: description
props.description: Contents of Input.Description component. If not set, description is not displayed.

props.name: descriptionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Description component

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, the component becomes disabled

props.name: error
props.description: Contents of Input.Error component. If not set, error is not displayed.

props.name: errorProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Error component

props.name: form
props.description: form prop passed down to the hidden input

props.name: format
props.description: Time format, '24h' by default

props.name: hiddenInputProps
props.description: Props passed down to the hidden input

props.name: hoursInputLabel
props.description: aria-label of hours input

props.name: hoursInputProps
props.description: Props passed down to hours input

props.name: hoursPlaceholder
props.description: Hours input placeholder,

props.name: hoursRef
props.description: A ref object to get node reference of the hours input

props.name: hoursStep
props.description: Number by which hours are incremented/decremented

props.name: inputContainer
props.description: Render function to wrap the input element. Useful for adding tooltips, popovers, or other wrappers around the input.

props.name: inputSize
props.description: HTML size attribute for the input element (number of visible characters)

props.name: inputWrapperOrder
props.description: Controls order and visibility of wrapper elements. Only elements included in this array will be rendered.

props.name: label
props.description: Contents of Input.Label component. If not set, label is not displayed.

props.name: labelProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Label component

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the left side of the input

props.name: leftSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the leftSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: leftSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the leftSection element

props.name: leftSectionWidth
props.description: Left section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-left, by default equals to the input height

props.name: loading
props.description: Displays loading indicator in the left or right section

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Position of the loading indicator

props.name: max
props.description: Max possible time value in hh:mm:ss format

props.name: maxDropdownContentHeight
props.description: Maximum height of the content displayed in the dropdown in px

props.name: min
props.description: Min possible time value in hh:mm:ss format

props.name: minutesInputLabel
props.description: aria-label of minutes input

props.name: minutesInputProps
props.description: Props passed down to minutes input

props.name: minutesPlaceholder
props.description: Minutes input placeholder,

props.name: minutesRef
props.description: A ref object to get node reference of the minutes input

props.name: minutesStep
props.description: Number by which minutes are incremented/decremented

props.name: name
props.description: name prop passed down to the hidden input

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Called once when the focus is no longer on any of the inputs

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the value changes

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Called once when one of the inputs is focused, not called when focused is shifted between hours, minutes, seconds and am/pm inputs

props.name: pasteSplit
props.description: A function to transform paste values, by default time in 24h format can be parsed on paste for example 23:34:22

props.name: pointer
props.description: Determines whether the input should have cursor: pointer style. Use when input acts as a button-like trigger (e.g., component="button" for Select/DatePicker).

props.name: popoverProps
props.description: Props passed down to Popover component

props.name: presets
props.description: Time presets to display in the dropdown

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: readOnly
props.description: If set, the value cannot be updated

props.name: required
props.description: Adds required attribute to the input and a red asterisk on the right side of label

props.name: reverseTimeControlsList
props.description: If set, the time controls list are reversed,

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the right side of the input

props.name: rightSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the rightSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: rightSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the rightSection element

props.name: rightSectionWidth
props.description: Right section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-right, by default equals to the input height

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props passed down to all underlying ScrollArea components

props.name: secondsInputLabel
props.description: aria-label of seconds input

props.name: secondsInputProps
props.description: Props passed down to seconds input

props.name: secondsPlaceholder
props.description: Seconds input placeholder,

props.name: secondsRef
props.description: A ref object to get node reference of the seconds input

props.name: secondsStep
props.description: Number by which seconds are incremented/decremented

props.name: size
props.description: Controls input height, horizontal padding, and font-size

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled component value

props.name: withAsterisk
props.description: If set, the required asterisk is displayed next to the label. Overrides required prop. Does not add required attribute to the input.

props.name: withDropdown
props.description: Determines whether the dropdown with time controls list should be visible when the input has focus

props.name: withErrorStyles
props.description: Determines whether the input should have red border and red text color when the error prop is set

props.name: withSeconds
props.description: Determines whether the seconds input should be displayed

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element
